section.title: Publications
section.subtitle: Research Outputs and Scholarly Communication
section.description: A structured publication directory for journal articles, conference papers, preprints, technical reports, software papers, datasets, and student outputs. Current entries are planning-ready placeholders and can be replaced with verified metadata, DOI links, paper URLs, code links, and related project links.

items.title: Hypnogram Transition Features for Sleep Disorder Screening
items.venue: Target journal to be confirmed
items.summary: A planned research article template for machine-learning-based sleep disorder screening using stage-transition and temporal hypnogram features.
items.abstract: This output can later document feature design, model evaluation, age-aware analysis, and clinical interpretation for sleep-stage-based disorder detection.

items.title: Human-Centered Biomedical AI for Signal-Based Decision Support
items.venue: Target venue to be confirmed
items.summary: A planned review direction covering biomedical signal processing, explainable AI, evaluation design, and responsible health-focused computing.
items.abstract: This article can synthesize methods across physiological signals, model validation, practical deployment constraints, and human-centered decision-support design.

items.title: Reusable Dashboards for Research Data Exploration and Reporting
items.venue: Software / systems venue to be confirmed
items.summary: A software-output template for dashboards that help researchers inspect datasets, experiments, metrics, plots, and project progress.
items.abstract: This output can describe design decisions, data-loading patterns, visualization components, and reproducibility benefits for research dashboard development.

items.title: Generative AI and Human-Centered Computing for Education and Training
items.venue: Education / AI conference to be confirmed
items.summary: A planned conference-paper direction on AI-assisted learning, student project supervision, research training, and responsible use of generative AI.
items.abstract: This output can examine how human-centered AI tools support skill development, internship pathways, feedback, and project-based learning.
relatedProjects: AI for Education and Research Training

items.title: Agentic AI Workflows for Literature Review, Experiment Tracking, and Research Automation
items.venue: HUMACH Technical Report Series
items.summary: A technical report template for AI-assisted research workflows, automation tools, structured project documentation, and reproducible reporting.
items.abstract: This report can document pipeline design, automation constraints, evaluation checks, and safe human-in-the-loop practices for research-oriented AI agents.

items.title: Dataset Documentation Template for HUMACH Research Projects
items.venue: Dataset / documentation output
items.summary: A reusable data-publication entry for future curated datasets, metadata dictionaries, preprocessing documentation, and reproducibility materials.
items.abstract: This template can later describe dataset origin, preprocessing steps, ethical considerations, variable definitions, and recommended baseline experiments.

items.title: Student and Intern Research Output Series
items.venue: HUMACH internal and public outputs
items.summary: A publication-track placeholder for internship reports, poster abstracts, portfolio projects, reproducible notebooks, and supervised student manuscripts.
items.abstract: This output stream can help students convert internship milestones into visible artifacts such as posters, reports, demos, code repositories, and manuscript drafts.
relatedProjects: AI for Education and Research Training

items.title: Epileptic seizure detection using CHB-MIT dataset: The overlooked perspectives
items.venue: Royal Society Open Science, 11(6):230601
items.summary: Addresses real-world seizure event detection concerns including continuous EEG imbalance, cross-subject variability, and event-level post-processing.

items.title: Sensor-based indoor air temperature prediction using deep ensemble machine learning: An Australian urban environment case study
items.venue: Urban Climate, 51:101599
items.summary: Deep ensemble machine-learning study for sensor-based indoor temperature forecasting in an Australian urban environment.

items.title: A LSB Based Image Steganography Using Random Pixel and Bit Selection for High Payload
items.venue: International Journal of Mathematical Sciences and Computing, 7(3):24-31
items.summary: Image steganography method using random pixel and bit selection for secure high-payload data hiding.

items.title: Enhancement of single-handed Bengali sign language recognition based on HOG features
items.venue: Journal of Theoretical and Applied Information Technology, 98(5):743-756
items.summary: Bengali sign-language recognition using image preprocessing, segmentation, HOG features, and KNN classification.

items.title: Mapping Character Position Based Cryptographic algorithm with Numerical Conversions
items.venue: International Journal of Computer Science and Software Engineering, 9(3):56-59
items.summary: Cryptographic algorithm using character position mapping and numerical conversions for data-security applications.

items.title: Pseudo random ternary sequence and its autocorrelation property over finite field
items.venue: International Journal of Computer Network and Information Security, 11(9):54
items.summary: Mathematical analysis of pseudo-random ternary sequence generation and autocorrelation properties over finite fields.

items.title: Smart Campus Using IoT with Bangladesh Perspective: A Possibility and Limitation
items.venue: International Journal of Research in Applied Science and Engineering Technologies, 8:1681-1690
items.summary: Explores IoT-enabled smart campus opportunities and limitations in the Bangladesh/HSTU context.

items.title: Study of Abstractive Text Summarization Techniques
items.venue: American Journal of Engineering Research, 6(8):253-260
items.summary: Survey and comparative study of abstractive text-summarization techniques with attention to Bengali text summarization challenges.

items.title: An Efficient Feature Optimization Approach with Machine Learning for Detection of Major Depressive Disorder Using EEG Signal
items.venue: 26th International Conference on Computer and Information Technology (ICCIT), IEEE
items.summary: Feature optimisation and machine-learning approach for major depressive disorder detection from EEG signals.

items.title: Optimal Feature Identification and Major Depressive Disorder Prediction through Correlation-Based Machine Learning Approach
items.venue: 6th International Conference on Electrical Information and Communication Technology (EICT), IEEE
items.summary: Correlation-based feature identification for MDD prediction using EEG features and machine-learning models.

items.title: Performance analysis of entropy methods in detecting epileptic seizure from surface Electroencephalograms
items.venue: 43rd Annual International Conference of the IEEE Engineering in Medicine & Biology Society (EMBC), pp. 1082-1085
items.summary: Compares entropy features for seizure detection from surface EEG across channels and subjects.

items.title: Efficient Noise Reduction and HOG Feature Extraction for Sign Language Recognition
items.venue: International Conference on Advancement in Electrical and Electronic Engineering (ICAEEE), IEEE
items.summary: Image-processing and HOG-feature extraction method for sign-language recognition.

items.title: Indexed Binary Search based efficient search generator for J2ME English to English dictionary
items.venue: International Conference on Informatics, Electronics & Vision (ICIEV), IEEE
items.summary: Indexed binary-search method for efficient J2ME dictionary lookup on mobile devices.

items.title: Deep Learning Model for Detection of Electrographic Seizures from continuous EEG in ICU patients
items.venue: American Epilepsy Society Annual Conference
items.summary: Proof-of-concept poster on CNN-based seizure detection from continuous ICU EEG recordings.

types.name: Journal Articles
types.summary: Peer-reviewed research manuscripts with full methodology, experiments, results, and interpretation.

types.name: Conference Papers
types.summary: Focused contributions suitable for presentation, student research, emerging ideas, and rapid feedback.

types.name: Preprints and Reports
types.summary: Early manuscripts, technical reports, project notes, and reproducibility-focused documentation.

types.name: Software and Data Papers
types.summary: Outputs that document tools, dashboards, datasets, repositories, pipelines, and reusable research assets.

workflow.title: Plan
workflow.summary: Map each output to a research area, project, dataset, and expected contribution.

workflow.title: Validate
workflow.summary: Check experiments, evidence, evaluation metrics, figures, code, and reproducibility materials.

workflow.title: Write
workflow.summary: Prepare manuscript, report, software note, student output, or dataset documentation.

workflow.title: Share
workflow.summary: Add DOI, paper link, code link, project link, and public-facing summary when available.
